__prompts__.project_slug: URL/package slug derived from the project name
__prompts__.github_username: GitHub username used for Dependabot assignees
__prompts__.domain_name: Bare deployment hostname used in generated environment defaults

behind_proxy.__prompt__: Production trusts an upstream proxy's X-Forwarded-Proto header
behind_proxy.yes: A reverse proxy terminates TLS and sets X-Forwarded-Proto (required for bundled Traefik)
behind_proxy.no: App is served over plain HTTP with no trusted proxy (internal/private network only)

postgres.compose: Run Postgres as a bundled Compose service
postgres.external: Use an external or managed Postgres-compatible database

redis.compose: Run Redis as a bundled Compose service
redis.external: Use an external Redis-compatible cache or broker

traefik_tls.__prompt__: Traefik TLS certificate source (ignored when use_traefik=no)
traefik_tls.letsencrypt: Use Traefik ACME with Let's Encrypt

use_celery.none: No Celery services or task module

use_example_api.yes: Include the example notes model, router, and tests

use_traefik.no: Expose API on localhost for bring-your-own ingress
